videos.headline: Mainz thrash Darmstadt to take more vital points
videos.title: Mainz thrash Darmstadt to take more vital points
videos.caption: Mainz's push to rise out of the Bundesliga relegation play-off spot continues with a 4-0 thrashing of bottom-placed Darmstadt.

videos.headline: Dortmund's title hopes slip through cracks in draw vs. Mainz
videos.title: Dortmund's title hopes slip through cracks in draw vs. Mainz
